__FORCETOC__

= Novice Alchemy Case =
{{RewardIconWithText|Novice Alchemy Case|blue}} randomly obtain 30 Reagents (up to {{Retext|blue|blue}}) and have a drop rate of:
* 70% {{RewardIconWithText|Green Reagent|green}}
* 30% {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Reagent|blue}}


= Expert Alchemy Case =
{{RewardIconWithText|Expert Alchemy Case|purple}} randomly obtain 30 Reagents (up to {{Retext|purple|purple}}) and have a drop rate of:
* 53.33% {{RewardIconWithText|Green Reagent|green}}
* 30% {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Reagent|blue}}
* 16.67% {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Reagent|purple}}

= Master Alchemy Case =
{{RewardIconWithText|Master Alchemy Case|orange}} randomly obtain 30 Reagents (up to {{Retext|orange|orange}}) and have a drop rate of:
* 48.33% {{RewardIconWithText|Green Reagent|green}}
* 30% {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Reagent|blue}}
* 15% {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Reagent|purple}}
* 6.67% {{RewardIconWithText|Orange Reagent|orange}}

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
